variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the broader SG&A row 'Sales and distribution costs' and the broader R&D row 'Research and development costs'. Per rules, selected the best overhead buckets from the full preview: 'Sales and distribution costs' and 'Administrative costs'. Included 'Research and development costs' as well because R&D is separately reported and PROF uses (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD); adding the same R&D row ensures removal via subtraction. Manual review flagged because final selection uses rows outside the provided candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and distribution costs, [Income Statement] Research and development costs

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is visible, so used total equity as BE. Per rule, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
No non-controlling interest/minority interest line is present on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
